chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 25 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.122/2023 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 26.01.2023 Mr. Ajeebullah Junejo, Advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Mr. Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- A.S.I. Khair Muhammad, Investigation Officer of Police Station, Daharki, District Ghotki is present and files copy of statement of petitioner No.1 (Mst. Kousar Bibi) recorded under Section 161, Cr.P.C, which is taken on record. As per statement of petitioner No.1, she has contracted love marriage with petitioner No.2 as per Muhammadan Law and her sweet wish; neither she is abducted nor kidnapped by any person and the FIR bearing Crime No.08/2023 of Police Station, Daharki under Sections 365-B, 363 and 452 PPC lodged by her mother, namely, Salooti Bibi against petitioner No.2 and others is false one. Investigation Officer states that he will make this statement part of the final challan/report under Section 173, Cr.P.C. and shall submit the same before the Judicial Magistrate concerned for obtaining orders in accordance with law. Learned Counsel for the petitioners, on being satisfied with the statement of Investigating Officer, seeks disposal of this petition with direction to police officials to provide protection to the petitioners. Accordingly, instant petition is disposed of along with listed application, by directing the concerned police officials to provide protection to the petitioners in accordance with law.

Learned Counsel for the petitioners, on being satisfied with the statement of Investigating Officer, seeks disposal of this petition with direction to police officials to provide protection to the petitioners. Accordingly, instant petition is disposed of along with listed application, by directing the concerned police officials to provide protection to the petitioners in accordance with law. Judge Judge ARBROHI
